title: Fortune 10 Pickaxe
description: Adds a Fortune 10 pickaxe. That is it.
body:
This mod adds a Fortune 10 (X) Pickaxe. Simple, right?
The pickaxe has Mining Level 4 (this is called Obsidian mining level in mods, while a Diamond Pickaxe has Mining Level 3, called Diamond), 2100 Durability, Mining Speed of 7 (Diamond Pickaxe has 8!), Enchantibility of 10 (same as Diamond Pickaxe, being 10), and can be repaired with a Diamond. Here is the recipe for it:

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bcae66f5c6d090edc68eaafa0c98e26a5a1402b.png)

I hope you liked this mod!
